# authentik_stage_account_lockdown (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create an account lockdown stage

resource "authentik_stage_account_lockdown" "name" {
  name                  = "account-lockdown"
  deactivate_user       = true
  set_unusable_password = true
  delete_sessions       = true
  revoke_tokens         = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `deactivate_user` (Boolean) Defaults to `true`.
- `delete_sessions` (Boolean) Defaults to `true`.
- `revoke_tokens` (Boolean) Defaults to `true`.
- `self_service_completion_flow` (String)
- `set_unusable_password` (Boolean) Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
